title: Smashed Sausage Tacos with Feta Crumble
summary: These smashed chorizo tacos are fresh, spicy and fruity and on the table in just 20 minutes. Made with Old El Paso’s new Street Vibes Al Pastor soft taco kit.

ingredients.label: 1 Old El Paso Street Vibes al Pastor Taco Kit
ingredients.name: Old El Paso Street Vibes al Pastor Taco Kit

method.description: Squeeze the chorizo sausage meat out from the sausage casings into a bowl (use regular pork sausages if you prefer). Discard the casings. Divide the sausage mixture equally between the tortillas then spread the meat onto the tortillas so you have an even layer on each. Sprinkle ¾ of the seasoning packet onto the sausage side of the tortillas.

Heat the olive oil in a small saucepan set over a medium heat until it just reaches smoking point. Meanwhile, thinly slice the cabbage and avocado. Toss the cabbage with some salt and lime juice. Thinly slice the spring onion and mince the coriander. Add both to a bowl with the sesame seeds, crumbled feta and remaining seasoning packet. Pour the smoking hot oil over and toss together.

Place a frying pan over medium-high heat with a drizzle of olive oil. Once hot, add the tortillas in batches, sausage meat side down, and cook for 3-5 mins until golden-brown. Flip and cook the tortilla side for a couple of seconds until golden. Transfer to a plate and cover. Continue until all the tortillas are cooked.
Serve the tacos with the cabbage slaw and some sliced avocado. Add as much fruity salsa as you want and any remaining feta or lime wedges.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
